---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature, skill, or agent
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

A clear description of the problem this feature would solve.

> Example: "I'm always frustrated when I have to manually..."

## Proposed Solution

Describe your proposed solution. Be as specific as possible.

## Feature Type

- [ ] New Skill (e.g., `tailwindcss-v4`, `supabase-patterns`)
- [ ] New Agent (e.g., a specialized DevRel agent)
- [ ] Pipeline Enhancement (e.g., new phase, better verification)
- [ ] CLI Improvement (e.g., new `npx zeoel-framework` command)
- [ ] Documentation Improvement
- [ ] Other

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

Any other context, mockups, or references that might help.

## Would You Like to Contribute This?

- [ ] Yes, I'd like to submit a PR for this
- [ ] No, I'm just suggesting it
